pi_items.source: Task description directly specifies the Application title to be set to 'Nexus Project Hub'.
Task description requires Welcome text 'Welcome to the Nexus Solutions project management portal.', which contains this fragment. The verifier checks for its inclusion.
Task description requires Date format 'YYYY-MM-DD' (ISO 8601). In OpenProject (a Ruby on Rails application), this corresponds to the internal strftime setting '%Y-%m-%d'.
Task description requires Start of week 'Monday'. As documented in setup_task.sh and standard Ruby conventions, 1 represents Monday.

privileged_info_summary: The task instructions explicitly define the target configuration state: the OpenProject application title must be set to 'Nexus Project Hub' and the welcome text must include 'Nexus Solutions'. For display settings, the ISO 8601 date format 'YYYY-MM-DD' translates internally to the strftime string '%Y-%m-%d', and the week start day of 'Monday' corresponds to the integer setting '1' in the Ruby on Rails backend. All expected metadata claims have been verified against the task text and OpenProject's setting formats.
